scripts.sync: bb /Users/rbalicki/code/voicemode/validate-edn.bb && cp /Users/rbalicki/code/voicemode/karabiner.edn ~/.config/ && goku && osascript -e 'display notification "Done syncing" with title "Karabiner"'
scripts.kinesis: test -d /Volumes/ADV360/layouts && for i in 1 2 3 4 5 6 7 8 9; do cp kinesis-layout1.txt /Volumes/ADV360/layouts/layout${i}.txt; done && echo 'Copied to all 9 layout slots' || echo 'Kinesis drive not mounted'
